owner_authorization.authorization_text: YES authorize P274B_PROSPECTIVE_EXECUTION_ACTIVATION_READINESS_PLAN as design and readiness assessment only.

immutable_p274a_contract.calendar_duration: approximately 11.5 years descriptive only; draw count governs

prohibited_scope: modify production code, tests, CI, dependencies, schema or runtime configuration

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Freeze future-only membership and prohibit retrospective conversion.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Design contract is committed; strict outcome blindness was not claimed because prior P271F outcomes were exposed.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_activation_state: Not activated; P271G marker was never itself activation.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Versioning, cutoff, leakage gates, amendment policy and no-backfill rule.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Concrete P274A activation boundary remains unset.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Define separate append-only activation, batch, ticket, event and outcome-link stores.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Design is committed with transaction, causality, uniqueness and failure contracts.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Five-stage phase separation and 14-case failure matrix.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Broader operating model, ownership, access, retention and monitoring were not completed.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Implement schema bootstrap and capture primitives on caller-supplied SQLite connections.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Implemented and tested only as an isolated library; no route, scheduler, network, DB path or production wiring.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_activation_state: Inactive; no real activation record or capture.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: 72 focused and 236 combined historical tests; source hash recorded.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: P274A-specific field mapping and runtime integration are absent.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Exercise additive install, rollback, idempotence, lock handling and path safety outside production.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Temporary SQLite rehearsal passed; source-grounded legacy fixture only.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: 37 focused historical tests and scenarios A-J pass.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Production concurrency, full schema, WAL behavior, backup and restore remain unproven.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Define apply-time safety gates, backup, rollback and writer quiescence.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Preflight package exists but is explicitly NOT_READY_FOR_APPLY.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: 14 stop gates, non-executable manifest, backup and rollback plan.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Fresh apply-time hash, maintenance window, writer shutdown, backup and WAL/SHM reconciliation.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Establish actual production prospective namespace state without write.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Historical read-only inspection found ABSENT_CLEAN; table/column presence only, not full schema equivalence.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_activation_state: No prospective schema, records or activation.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: 17 tables, 42 indexes, 1 view, 0 triggers; no prospective objects.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Apply-time state must be reverified; this task did not reopen the DB.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Normalize ticket payloads and derive deterministic identity/hash.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Main numbers are sorted and payload_hash/ledger_id are deterministic.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Pure helper and synthetic tests exist.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: P274A candidate_id, canonical ticket identity list, cross-ticket distinct-count proof and explicit ticket_fingerprint fields are not fully represented.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Reject update/delete and preserve event history.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: DB triggers cover all five prospective data tables in isolated schema.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: P271J and P271K trigger tests pass; payload hash verification exists.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: No external digest anchor, WORM copy or production enforcement evidence.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Require prediction time before draw close and keep capture independent of results.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Strict inequality and explicit skew margin are implemented on caller-supplied values; capture imports no result path.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Fail-closed timestamp and source checks exist.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: No authoritative resolver, trusted clock, drift monitor or outcome-availability oracle.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Bind every capture to the correct official DAILY_539 draw.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: target_draw is persisted and unique within activation.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Schema and identity tuple support target_draw.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Official exception-aware resolver and source verification are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Accept only frozen candidate/version pairs.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: capture_batch accepts a caller-supplied known_strategy_versions set.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Unknown versions fail closed.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Immutable candidate manifest, source digest mapping and candidate_id persistence are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Persist the exact scorer/endpoint contract used for later evaluation.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: P271J deliberately does not import the scorer and has no scorer_endpoint_version column.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: P274A requires scorer_endpoint_version.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Schema/data contract and immutable endpoint digest mapping are absent.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Register immutable activation metadata and append lifecycle events.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Synthetic activation APIs and event-derived active state exist.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Activation registry/lifecycle tests exist.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Owner-authorized G5/G6 workflow, real boundary fields and production evidence are absent.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Record whether an outcome was unavailable, available or ingested without exposing it to capture.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: An outcome-link table schema exists, but no public append API or availability-state workflow exists.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Outcome columns are separated from prediction ledger.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Outcome availability status, trusted publication source and ingestion API are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Join results only after draw completion without changing membership.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Separate table is designed; capture never reads or writes results.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Schema separation and no-result imports are confirmed.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Result linker, authorization, idempotency and provenance implementation are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Classify gaps and prevent retrospective repair.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: No operational policy or threshold is implemented.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: No-backfill invariant is frozen.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Maximum tolerated gaps and pause/invalidation thresholds are OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Prevent two eligible records for one semantic identity.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Derived primary key plus semantic unique index; atomic failure and rejection event.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Concurrent duplicate synthetic evidence exists.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Production behavior remains unverified until installation and preflight.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Trace actor, service, code, schedule and source artifact.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Events have actor/service/code/transaction/hash; ticket source_provenance is only a non-empty string.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Event schema is append-only.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Structured provenance schema, candidate manifest digest and official source response digest enforcement are incomplete.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Run capture reliably before each eligible draw.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: No route, scheduler, capture worker or network integration exists.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: P271J explicitly guarantees no scheduler.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Disabled-by-default one-shot worker, scheduler policy and deployment evidence are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Recover safely after process or host failure without backfill.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Transaction rollback is tested, but runtime restart recovery is not designed or exercised.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Atomic write behavior is known.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Checkpointing, retry-before-close, crash reconciliation and operator runbook are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Detect silence, late capture, drift, digest mismatch and storage failures.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: No prospective monitor or alert interface is committed.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: None beyond historical test evidence.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Metrics, alert routes, escalation owner and thresholds are OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Export immutable evidence for independent review.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Read-only list/get/hash helpers exist.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Ledger and event rows can be inspected.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Canonical export schema, signed manifest, batch digest and independent verification tool are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Restrict activation, capture, amendments, exports and result linking.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Library accepts actor strings but performs no authentication or authorization.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: No production interface exists.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Role model, credential ownership, least privilege and incident response are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Prove capture timestamps and enforce a trusted skew margin.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Explicit timezone-aware timestamps and caller-supplied margin are validated.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Naive timestamps fail closed.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Clock source, synchronization telemetry, maximum drift and outage behavior are OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Preserve 3605-draw evidence and auditability across migrations.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: No retention, archive or legal/operational ownership contract exists.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Append-only local schema is only a storage primitive.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Retention duration, archive format, restore tests and deletion authority are OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Maintain the protocol over the descriptive multi-year horizon.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: No named service owner, on-call rotation or handoff process is committed.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Governance identifies human gates only.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Primary/backup owner, succession, budget and periodic review cadence are OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Preserve originals and disallow outcome-dependent correction.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Append-only pre-close amendments are supported; post-close and identity-changing amendments are rejected.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: Synthetic amendment tests exist.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Operational approval workflow and classification of permissible pre-close corrections are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Detect alteration of ticket payloads and evidence sets.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Per-ticket payload hashes are implemented.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: verify_payload_hash exists.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: No batch Merkle/digest chain, external anchor, signing key or periodic audit exists.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Apply fixed 50/300/final rules to prospective-only records.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Statistical protocol is designed but no prospective evaluator is implemented.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: P274A fixes tests and decision classes.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: Outcome linker, evaluator, conditional-power calculation and frozen analysis package are missing.

p271_dependency_inventory.purpose: Own keys only if evidence signing or external timestamping is selected.
p271_dependency_inventory.current_implementation_state: Current P271 design uses no secrets or signatures.
p271_dependency_inventory.evidence_available: No key dependency today.
p271_dependency_inventory.missing_evidence: If signing is chosen, key custody, rotation and revocation become OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.

readiness_ladder.name: Protocol And Governance Frozen
mandatory_inputs: Fixed endpoint, family, horizon and boundary algorithm
exit_criteria: Immutable facts match and concrete boundary remains unset
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Protocol can be superseded only by an owner-approved new preregistration before activation

readiness_ladder.name: Execution Architecture Design Approved
readiness_ladder.responsible_owner: Owner plus architecture, operations and security owners
exit_criteria: Owner explicitly approves architecture and resolves required operating decisions
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Design may be revised while boundary remains unset

readiness_ladder.name: Implementation Authorization
evidence_required: Explicit owner authorization text for a future task
exit_criteria: Authorization names components, files, environments and forbidden actions
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Authorization may be withdrawn before implementation writes
readiness_ladder.next_required_authorization: G3 implementation tasks, each separately scoped

readiness_ladder.name: Implementation And Isolated Validation Complete
prohibited_actions: Production DB write unless separately authorized
exit_criteria: All required components implemented and isolated tests, restart, fault and security evidence pass
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Code can be reverted before production installation; evidence remains auditable

readiness_ladder.name: Production-Safety Preflight Complete
exit_criteria: All apply-time blockers cleared and post-apply verification plan approved
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Preflight can be invalidated without production effect
readiness_ladder.next_required_authorization: Separate production apply authorization, then P271M verification

readiness_ladder.name: Activation Authorization
exit_criteria: Owner authorizes a separate boundary-assignment task
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Authorization can be withdrawn before boundary assignment

readiness_ladder.name: Boundary Assignment
evidence_required: activation_timestamp_utc and first_eligible_target_draw recorded before outcome exposure
readiness_ladder.responsible_owner: Authorized activation operator plus owner witness
exit_criteria: Boundary sealed, exported and independently verified
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Not reversible after eligible outcome exposure; before exposure, owner may cancel without reuse

readiness_ladder.name: Prospective Capture Start
exit_criteria: Each eligible draw is handled prospectively and evidence remains auditable
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Capture may pause; already valid records remain immutable
readiness_ladder.next_required_authorization: Continue under monitoring; no efficacy authorization

readiness_ladder.name: Monitoring And Final Analysis
exit_criteria: Protocol closes with governed candidate/project classes
readiness_ladder.rollback_possible: Statistical result is not rolled back; protocol may close or invalidate
readiness_ladder.next_required_authorization: Any production promotion is a separate future gate

current_gate_position.evidence_based_reason: P274A is frozen and merged. P271I/P271J/P271K provide component design and isolated ledger evidence, but G1 operating ownership and architecture choices remain unresolved; G2 has no current authorization.

design_principles: Separate prediction, outcome and evaluation planes
Fail closed on uncertain identity, time, source or version
Technology-neutral until owner decisions are recorded

components.name: Frozen candidate manifest
components.responsibility: Map C1-C3 to exact strategy source digests, versions, expected ticket counts and scorer endpoint digest.

components.name: Prediction producer adapter
components.responsibility: Invoke frozen candidate versions without result access and return normalized ticket payloads.

components.name: Official draw identity and close resolver
components.responsibility: Resolve target draw, scheduled close, source version and exceptions in Asia/Taipei then UTC.

components.name: Trusted time service
components.responsibility: Provide capture time, drift telemetry and fail-closed trust state.

components.name: Normalization and fingerprint service
components.responsibility: Sort/validate ticket numbers, map bet indexes, compute distinct tickets and deterministic fingerprints.

components.name: Append-only evidence writer
components.responsibility: Atomically write activation, batch, ticket and event records with uniqueness and tamper evidence.

components.name: Evidence seal and audit exporter
components.responsibility: Create canonical draw/batch manifests, digest them and export independently verifiable evidence.

components.name: Outcome availability and result linker
components.responsibility: Track publication separately and append result links only after official completion.

components.name: Prospective evaluator
components.responsibility: Read only sealed prospective records and enforce 50/300/3605 rules with m=3.

components.name: Monitoring and operations plane
components.responsibility: Observe schedules, capture latency, gaps, drift, duplicates, storage, digests and operator coverage.

pre_outcome_capture_sequence: Load sealed activation and candidate manifests
Resolve official target draw and close time from a verified versioned source
Verify trusted clock and drift state
Generate predictions from frozen versions without outcome access
Normalize tickets and compute distinct-ticket identities/fingerprints
Validate candidate/scorer/source versions and strict pre-close causality
Atomically append batch, ticket and event evidence
Seal and export a canonical batch digest before outcome availability
Only then mark capture complete for monitoring
post_outcome_sequence: Detect official outcome availability in a separate process
Append an idempotent result link with provenance
Never alter prediction membership or payload
Evaluate only through the frozen prospective evaluator
Export checkpoint/final evidence without optional stopping

correction_policy.allowed: Only owner-defined, pre-close, append-only corrections that preserve identity and original evidence.
correction_policy.owner_decision_required: Define which pre-close correction classes, if any, are allowed.

advantages: Strong local transaction and uniqueness semantics
risks: Access and long-horizon migration not designed

storage_options.option: Separate append-only evidence database or object store
risks: New technology, deployment and migration scope

storage_options.option: Dual evidence: transactional ledger plus WORM/signed export
advantages: Operational writes plus independent tamper evidence

operator_boundaries: Activation operator cannot change candidates or analysis rules
Manual correction requires separate audited role

secrets_and_keys.current_need: No secret is required by the isolated P271J library.
secrets_and_keys.if_signing_selected: Key custody, signing service, rotation, revocation and independent verifier ownership are OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Persist protocol_version and activation_id
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: P271J has protocol and activation fields; P274A mapping not deployed.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Persist candidate_id and immutable candidate manifest digest
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: P271J has strategy fields but no P274A candidate_id.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Persist lottery_type, official target_draw and official scheduled timestamp
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Storage exists; authoritative resolver does not.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Persist strategy_id and exact strategy_version/source digest
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Caller set is supported; sealed manifest absent.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Persist scorer_endpoint_version/digest
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Required by P274A and absent in P271J.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Persist normalized canonical ticket identities, bet indexes and distinct_ticket_count
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Per-ticket normalized payload exists; explicit distinct count and candidate-level set evidence absent.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Persist deterministic ticket fingerprints and batch digest
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Per-ticket payload hash exists; canonical batch seal absent.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Use trusted capture timestamp with drift evidence
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Caller timestamp validation is insufficient for production trust.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Enforce capture before outcome availability
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Close-time check exists; outcome availability oracle absent.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Append-only DB enforcement and tamper detection
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Confirmed in isolated schema, not production.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Atomic idempotent capture and duplicate protection
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Implemented and tested in isolated environments.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Separate outcome availability, result ingestion and evaluation
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Schema separation exists; runtime services absent.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: No retrospective backfill or family replacement
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Governance and isolated capture rules fail closed.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Restart recovery without post-outcome retry
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Runtime recovery policy absent.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Monitoring, alerting and operator escalation
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Interfaces and thresholds absent.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Canonical audit export with reload/digest verification
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Read helpers are not an export contract.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Role-based access and audited manual operations
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: No authentication/authorization exists.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Retention, archival, backup and restore across migrations
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Frozen prospective evaluator for 50/300/final rules
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: No prospective evaluator exists.

prospective_capture_requirements.requirement: Activation boundary sealed before any eligible outcome
prospective_capture_requirements.notes: Explicitly prohibited and unset in P274B.

cadence_assumptions.assumption_risk: Cancellations, make-ups, rule changes and outages can change calendar duration.

minimum_ongoing_maintenance_commitments: Named primary and backup service owners
Documented on-call and escalation coverage for every scheduled draw
Verified schedule-source refresh and exception handling
Pre-draw capture health check and post-capture evidence seal verification
Daily/weekly audit of missing, duplicate, late and digest-mismatch events
Dependency, credential and security patch maintenance
Periodic owner-approved protocol ownership and scientific-value review
Immutable handoff package for staff or agent transitions

maximum_tolerated_capture_gaps.reason: P274A freezes no numerical missingness threshold. A threshold must be pre-registered with statistical sensitivity before activation.
options: Zero tolerated unexplained eligible-draw gaps; any gap pauses pending owner review.
A bounded missingness envelope defined before activation with sensitivity analysis and no backfill.
Scientific closure if required coverage cannot be sustained.

missingness_classifications.effect: Not counted; require official cancellation evidence.
Pause; no capture until resolved before close.
Eligible draw becomes missing if not recovered before close; no backfill.
Affected candidate/draw missing; family m remains 3.
Reject and treat as integrity breach, never evidence.
Use only an independently sealed pre-outcome copy; otherwise invalidate affected evidence.
Capture may remain valid; evaluation waits; provenance required.

pause_conditions: Lottery rule or calendar change pending review
protocol_invalidation_conditions: Unrecoverable loss of canonical pre-outcome evidence
Material lottery-rule change that alters endpoint/null without a new preregistration
Security breach that makes evidence timing or integrity unprovable
owner_reauthorization_conditions: Change storage, schedule source, clock source or signer
scientific_closure_conditions: Owner declines the approximately multi-year maintenance commitment
Lottery rules make the frozen endpoint obsolete
Candidate implementation becomes unavailable without valid frozen replacement
Expected scientific value no longer justifies ongoing operational burden

long_horizon_sustainability.horizon_statement: 3605 draws govern. Approximately 11.5 years is descriptive, not exact.

risks.mitigation: Named primary/backup owner, succession plan and owner-approved periodic review.
Versioned runbook, architecture decision record, credential map and signed handoff checklist.
Frozen source/container digest and reproducible build; no silent upgrade.
Persist endpoint digest and run compatibility fixtures before every release.
Pause immediately; owner decides invalidation, new protocol or closure.
Versioned official schedule resolver; draw count remains governing.
Dual-read verification, digest reconciliation and separate owner authorization.
Rotation runbook and overlap test; no missed capture during rotation.
P271L plan exists; production restore rehearsal and recurring cadence absent.
Append-only local design plus independent archive/digest anchor decision.
Actionable alerts, escalation tiers and periodic alert-quality review.
No backfill; classify gaps, pause, and trigger owner reauthorization/closure.
Retirement never shrinks m=3; affected candidate closes per governed class.
Budget storage, monitoring, maintenance, audits, migrations, security and independent review.
Annual review may recommend continue, HOLD or scientific closure without peeking for efficacy.

ownership_transfer_contract: No transfer without named accepting owner
Transfer package includes manifests, keys/credentials, runbook, open incidents, evidence digests and gate state
Old and new owner jointly verify one pre-outcome rehearsal
Transfer cannot change candidate family or boundary
long_horizon_sustainability.temporary_suspension: Allowed for safety. Missed draws remain missing and cannot be backfilled. Resume requires the applicable owner decision and evidence.
long_horizon_sustainability.permanent_invalidation: Required when timing, identity, boundary or evidence integrity cannot be proven.
long_horizon_sustainability.candidate_retirement: Allowed only as closure of that candidate; Bonferroni m remains 3 and no replacement enters the family.

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Outcome-availability timestamp <= capture seal or result access log
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Reject record, freeze candidate/family and preserve incident evidence
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Independent timing audit and incident report
failure_mode_matrix.protocol_invalidated: YES if exposure scope cannot be isolated

failure_mode_matrix.detection: NTP/clock telemetry exceeds governed trust state or timestamps conflict
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Fail closed before write
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Existing sealed records remain valid; uncertain interval quarantined
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Clock logs and independent source comparison

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Missed pre-draw heartbeat or expected job absence
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Attempt recovery only before close; otherwise mark missing
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Prior records valid; missed draw has no record
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Job logs, host incident and gap classification

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Semantic unique-key conflict or repeated batch digest
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Reject duplicate idempotently and alert on conflicting payload
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Uniqueness event and payload comparison

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Normalization or fingerprint field absent
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Reject entire affected batch
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Fixed pre-close payload and passing identity audit

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Count differs from expected 3/3/5 or duplicate collapse occurs
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Pause affected candidate and investigate before close
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: May remain valid only if actual identities are complete and protocol test handles actual N
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Canonical tickets, reason and independent review

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Manifest digest differs from frozen candidate digest
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Reject capture and disable candidate
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Reproducible build/digest audit

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Endpoint digest mismatch or fixture incompatibility
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Pause capture/evaluation; do not rescore opportunistically
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Capture may be quarantined; evaluation invalid until frozen scorer restored
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Scorer digest and compatibility fixtures

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Runtime registry identity differs from frozen manifest
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Do not mutate registry; reject and alert
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Manifest-to-runtime audit

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Official draw resolver and payload disagree
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Reject batch and pause resolver
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Official schedule snapshot and resolver replay

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Versioned source publishes changed/cancelled draw
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Pause until change is verified before close
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: New source digest and owner-approved handling

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Official game rules alter ticket space or endpoint
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Suspend protocol immediately
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Prior records valid under old rules; future comparability uncertain
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Official rule evidence and statistical impact review
failure_mode_matrix.protocol_invalidated: YES unless new preregistration governs a separate family

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Schema/version changes without prospective compatibility proof
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Pause writes; preserve pre-migration snapshot
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Existing records valid only after digest reconciliation
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Migration plan, dual-read comparison and restore proof

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Read error, malformed row or archive checksum failure
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Quarantine store and use only independently sealed copies
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Affected evidence invalid absent verified pre-outcome copy
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Restore and complete digest reconciliation

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Recomputed ticket/batch/export digest differs
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Stop capture and evaluation; preserve both versions
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Root-cause report and independent digest match

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Audit log shows unapproved amendment or direct write
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Freeze affected family and revoke access
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Access logs and immutable incident report

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Batch/event/ticket counts disagree or transaction failure
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Rollback; retry only before close with same deterministic identity
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Failed attempt creates no eligible record
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Transaction logs and count reconciliation

failure_mode_matrix.detection: capture_mode non-live or target already closed
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Reject, alert and preserve rejection event
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Rejection evidence

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Consecutive or cumulative gaps exceed owner-governed rule
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Remain paused; no historical substitution
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Prior records valid; gaps remain missing
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Outage report and statistical missingness assessment

failure_mode_matrix.detection: No qualified primary/backup responder for scheduled draw
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Pause before unattended capture if safety cannot be assured
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Restored roster and handoff verification

failure_mode_matrix.detection: No heartbeat or alert telemetry
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Treat system as unsafe and pause
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Telemetry restoration and gap audit

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Build/runtime cannot generate frozen candidate
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Mark candidate/draw missing; do not replace candidate
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Other candidates may remain valid; m stays 3
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Failure logs and owner closure decision

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Runtime/library no longer supported or reproducible
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Freeze upgrades and pause affected component
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Reproducible migration/compatibility evidence

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Unauthorized credential use, code execution or data access
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Revoke access, pause all capture and preserve forensic evidence
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Affected interval invalid unless integrity/timing independently proven
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Forensic report, key rotation and independent audit

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Result-link timestamp precedes batch seal
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Reject linkage and invalidate affected draw evidence
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Independent logs and incident report

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Required evidence unavailable after storage event
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Stop analysis and recover from verified archive only
failure_mode_matrix.record_validity: Lost interval invalid if no verified copy
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Restore proof and digest reconciliation

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Schedule or result authority cannot be verified
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Fail closed; do not use manual source as confirmatory
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Verified source restoration
failure_mode_matrix.protocol_invalidated: NO unless unverified data was accepted

failure_mode_matrix.detection: Capture/export/monitoring credentials unavailable or inconsistent
failure_mode_matrix.immediate_safe_action: Pause affected operations before close
failure_mode_matrix.recovery_evidence: Rotation audit and end-to-end rehearsal

implementation_prerequisites: Owner approves G1 architecture and selects the evidence-store pattern.
Owner names service, operations, security and scientific owners with backups.
Official target-draw/close source hierarchy and exception policy are selected and manually verified.
Trusted clock source, drift telemetry and fail-closed policy are defined; numerical drift threshold is OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED.
A sealed P274A candidate manifest maps C1-C3 to exact source/dependency digests and expected ticket semantics.
P271J contract is extended or adapted to persist candidate_id, scorer_endpoint_version, explicit canonical ticket fingerprints, distinct_ticket_count and outcome availability status.
Disabled-by-default prediction producer, draw resolver and one-shot capture worker are implemented without result access.
Outcome availability/result linker and prospective evaluator are implemented as separate read-only/write-limited components.
Canonical audit export, batch digest and independent verifier are implemented.
Monitoring, alerting, access control, restart recovery, retention and migration interfaces are implemented.
Synthetic fault, concurrency, restart, security and long-horizon migration tests pass with no production DB access.
Operations runbooks and missingness policy are approved before any production preflight.
activation_prerequisites: G1 through G4 exit criteria are complete with current evidence.
A separate owner decision authorizes production installation/apply; P274B does not.
Prospective schema/runtime deployment is verified under P271M or equivalent post-apply evidence.
P271N-style activation authorization is explicitly granted after evidence review.
Official schedule source and trusted clock are healthy and independently checked.
Candidate, strategy, scorer and dependency manifests are sealed and reproducible.
Monitoring, on-call, backup, restore, access-control and security incident processes are active.
Maximum tolerated capture gaps and missingness classifications are owner-governed.
A separate G6 task records activation_timestamp_utc and first_eligible_target_draw before outcome exposure.
Boundary export/digest is independently verified before G7 capture begins.
No production apply, activation or capture is inferred from implementation completion.
production_blockers: Production prospective namespace is ABSENT_CLEAN; schema is not installed.
Production apply remains NOT_READY_FOR_APPLY and unauthorized.
Fresh apply-time DB hash, maintenance window, writer quiescence, backup/restore and WAL/SHM evidence are absent.
P271M post-apply verification and P271N activation are unstarted.
No production capture worker, scheduler or authoritative draw-close resolver exists.
No trusted clock/drift monitoring contract is approved.
P274A-required candidate_id, scorer endpoint version, explicit distinct-ticket evidence and outcome availability status are incomplete in P271J.
No live monitoring, alert escalation, restart recovery, access control or security model exists.
No long-horizon retention, independent archive or migration continuity evidence exists.
No named maintenance/on-call ownership or gap threshold exists.
No frozen prospective evaluator or audit-export interface exists.
Concrete activation boundary remains unset and unauthorized.

owner_decision_points.decision: Proceed to G1 approval, HOLD, or scientific closure
options: Approve architecture only and resolve blockers before G2
Transactional ledger plus independent WORM/signed archive
Verified deterministic configuration; manual remains non-confirmatory
Fail closed whenever trust cannot be proven

owner_decision_points.decision: Maximum tolerated capture gaps and missingness rule
options: Pre-registered bounded envelope with sensitivity analysis
Close protocol when coverage cannot be sustained
Protocol lifetime plus owner-defined audit period
Scientific closure if durable retention cannot be funded
No signing with independently stored hashes
Signed manifests with managed key ownership
Append-only pre-close correction with dual approval

owner_decision_points.decision: Infrastructure migration and dependency upgrade policy
options: Pre-approved reproducible migrations with dual verification
Close affected candidate rather than upgrade
Permanent closure after owner-governed missingness limit
Authorize isolated resolver/worker/monitor/export/evaluator only after OD-02 through OD-13

readiness_verdict.basis: G0 is confirmed, G1 is partial pending owner approval and operating decisions, G2 is unauthorized, and critical production/operational capabilities are missing.

recommended_next_gate.recommendation: Review and approve or reject the architecture, resolve owner decision points, then issue a separately scoped G2 authorization only if the evidence becomes complete.

canonicalization.method: SHA-256 over UTF-8 JSON of the full result object after recursively sorting object keys, preserving array order, using compact separators and no ASCII escaping.
canonicalization.note: Only generated_at and canonical_payload_digest are excluded.
